items.name: Video Generation
items.summary: A repository for semi-automatically generating long-form explainer videos from Markdown articles, with optional Shorts generation.

items.name: National Budget Visualization Tool
items.summary: A static web app for visualizing budget review CSV data from the RS system entirely in the browser.

items.name: Political Position Visualization Application
items.summary: A development repository for an application that visualizes political parties and politicians from primary official sources based on a specification.

items.name: Artificial_Life_Simulator_GUI
items.summary: A PySide6 GUI application for operating and observing an artificial life simulation.

items.name: SampleAppForBlog
items.summary: A repository bundling two sample apps that can be used in blog posts explaining publishing workflows.

items.name: LLM-Curriculum-Architect
items.summary: A fully autonomous reinforcement learning framework driven by LLMs.

items.name: GenesisRobotics
items.summary: A simulator environment for NHK Student Robocon 2025 XROBOCON.

items.name: GenesisRobotics2025ForXrobocon
items.summary: A simulator environment for NHK Student Robocon 2025 XROBOCON.

items.name: gemini-er-agentic-dashboard-test
items.summary: An autonomous robot control demo using Gemini Robotics-ER.

items.name: auto-visual-inspection-generator
items.summary: This project accepts image uploads and Japanese specification inputs for automated visual inspection workflows.
